```{r}
library(here)
library(readr)
source(here("scripts/03_summarize_drugs_methodswise_functions.R"))
```

```{r}
# read in the 107 highly confidence drugs from the prediction
drug_prediction = read_tsv(here("data/v2/tableS2/final_high_confidence_drug_predictions.tsv"))
drug_prediction = drug_prediction$drug_name

```

```{r set data to run for reading in drug results}
data_to_run = read_tsv(here("data/v2/signatures/RNAseq_TB_signature_run_info.tsv"))
data_to_run = data_to_run[data_to_run$signature == 1,]
```

```{r RNAseq LINCS WCS}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/LINCS")
score_method = "LINCS"
score = "WCS"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
WTCS_vec = drug_cell_score$WTCS

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
WTCS_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = WTCS_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(WTCS <= WTCS_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_WCS_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(WTCS)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))  

write_tsv(rnaseq_WCS_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_WCS_cellline_reversal.tsv"))
```

```{r RNAseq LINCS NCS}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/LINCS")
score_method = "LINCS"
score = "NCS"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
NCS_vec = drug_cell_score$NCS

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
NCS_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = NCS_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(NCS <= NCS_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_NCS_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(NCS)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))  

write_tsv(rnaseq_NCS_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_NCS_cellline_reversal.tsv"))

```

```{r RNAseq LINCS Tau}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/LINCS")
score_method = "LINCS"
score = "Tau"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
Tau_vec = drug_cell_score$Tau

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
Tau_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = Tau_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(Tau <= Tau_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_Tau_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(Tau)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))

write_tsv(rnaseq_Tau_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_Tau_cellline_reversal.tsv"))

```

```{r rnaseq CMAP}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/CMAP")
score_method = "CMAP"
score = "CMAP"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
CMAP_vec = drug_cell_score$scaled_score

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
CMAP_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = CMAP_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(scaled_score <= CMAP_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_CMAP_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(scaled_score)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))  

write_tsv(rnaseq_CMAP_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_CMAP_cellline_reversal.tsv"))
```

```{r rnaseq Cor pearson}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/Cor")
score_method = "Cor"
score = "Cor_pearson"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
pearson_vec = drug_cell_score$cor_score

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
pearson_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = pearson_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(cor_score <= pearson_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_pearson_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(cor_score)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))  

write_tsv(rnaseq_pearson_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_pearson_cellline_reversal.tsv"))

```

```{r rnaseq Cor spearman}
# get drug results for all scores
drug_res_path = here("results/RNAseq/Cor")
score_method = "Cor"
score = "Cor_spearman"
drug_cell_score = get_drug_results(data_to_run, drug_res_path, score_method, score)
drug_cell_score_prediction = drug_cell_score[drug_cell_score$pert %in% drug_prediction,]
spearman_vec = drug_cell_score$cor_score

# identify threshold using the score vector from drug results
spearman_threshold = determine_threshold(score_vec = spearman_vec, values = "neg", tail = "left", score_percentile = 0.8)

# get number of cell lines ("cell" column) reversed by each drug (passing the threshold)
library(dplyr)

# filter for scores passing the threshold (indicating reversal)
reversed_cells <- drug_cell_score %>%
  filter(cor_score <= spearman_threshold)

# summarise per drug
rnaseq_spearman_reversal_summary <- reversed_cells %>%
  group_by(pert) %>%
  summarise(
    n_reversed_cells = n_distinct(cell),
    min_score_cell = cell[which.min(cor_score)],
    all_reversed_cells = paste(unique(cell), collapse = ", ")
  ) %>%
  arrange(desc(n_reversed_cells))  

write_tsv(rnaseq_spearman_reversal_summary, here("figures/figureSX_rnaseq_spearman_cellline_reversal.tsv"))
```
